  • Classes in nonprofitbookkeeping.service used by controller
    Class
    Description
    TrialBalanceService
    TrialBalanceResultIntf defines the contract for a trial balance result.
  • Classes in nonprofitbookkeeping.service used by core
    Class
    Description
    TrialBalanceResultIntf
    TrialBalanceResultIntf is a concrete implementation representing the results of a trial balance computation.
  • Classes in nonprofitbookkeeping.service used by nonprofitbookkeeping
    Class
    Description
    DocumentStorageService
    DocumentStorageService handles storage and retrieval of documents (e.g., PDFs, JPGs, PNGs) associated with transactions.
    FundAccountingService
    FundAccountingService handles the account balances for different funds and supports transferring funds between them.
    InventoryService
    InventoryService manages inventory items for the nonprofit bookkeeping system.

    DocumentStorageService handles storage and retrieval of documents (e.g., PDFs, JPGs, PNGs) associated with transactions.

    FundAccountingService handles the account balances for different funds and supports transferring funds between them.
    InventoryService
    InventoryService manages inventory items for the nonprofit bookkeeping system.
